debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : Field R
inst✝³ : LinearOrder R
inst✝² : IsStrictOrderedRing R
inst✝¹ : AddCommGroup E
inst✝ : Module R E
s : Finset ι
f : ι → E
t : Finset { x // x ∈ ↑s }
w : { x // x ∈ ↑s } → R
hw₀ : ∀ i ∈ t, 0 ≤ w i
hw₁ : t.sum w = 1
⊢ ∑ x ∈ {x ∈ s | ∃ (x_1 : x ∈ s), ⟨x, ⋯⟩ ∈ t}.attach, w ⟨↑x, ⋯⟩ = 1 ∧
    s.centerMass (fun i => if h : ∃ (x : i ∈ s), ⟨i, ⋯⟩ ∈ t then w ⟨i, ⋯⟩ else 0) f =
      (affineCombination R t (f ∘ Subtype.val)) w

        · intro b hb

          simp only [mem_filter, mem_attach, true_and]
          exact ⟨hsb, b, hb, rfl⟩
        · intro a ha
